inputs.label: Area to Paint
inputs.businessContext: Total area to be painted in square meters.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total area to be painted in square meters.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamtfläche in Quadratmetern, die gestrichen werden soll.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Surface totale à peindre en mètres carrés.
businessContext_i18n.es: Área total a pintar en metros cuadrados.

inputs.label: Number of Coats
inputs.businessContext: Number of paint coats to apply.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of paint coats to apply.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre de couches de peinture à appliquer.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de capas de pintura a aplicar.

inputs.label: Coverage per Liter
inputs.businessContext: Manufacturer's stated coverage in m² per liter.

businessContext_i18n.en: Manufacturer's stated coverage in m² per liter.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Üreticinin belirttiği, m²/litre cinsinden kaplama alanı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Vom Hersteller angegebene Ergiebigkeit in m² pro Liter.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Rendement déclaré par le fabricant en m² par litre.
businessContext_i18n.es: Rendimiento declarado por el fabricante en m² por litro.

inputs.label: Waste Factor
inputs.businessContext: Expected paint wastage as percentage (e.g., overspray, spillage).

businessContext_i18n.en: Expected paint wastage as percentage (e.g., overspray, spillage).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Beklenen boya israfı yüzdesi (örneğin, fazla püskürtme, dökülme).
businessContext_i18n.de: Erwarteter Farbverlust in Prozent (z. B. Overspray, Verschütten).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage de perte de peinture prévu (ex. surpulvérisation, déversement).
businessContext_i18n.es: Porcentaje de desperdicio de pintura esperado (p. ej., sobrepulverización, derrames).

label_i18n.es: Factor de rugosidad de la superficie

businessContext_i18n.de: Multiplikator für raue Oberflächen (1,0 = glatt, 1,5 = rau).

inputs.label: Paint Price per Liter
inputs.businessContext: Cost of paint per liter in local currency.

label_i18n.fr: Prix de la peinture au litre
label_i18n.es: Precio de la pintura por litro

businessContext_i18n.en: Cost of paint per liter in local currency.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yerel para birimi cinsinden litre başına boya maliyeti.
businessContext_i18n.de: Farbkosten pro Liter in lokaler Währung.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coût de la peinture par litre en devise locale.
businessContext_i18n.es: Costo de la pintura por litro en moneda local.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
